subcodes.first_line: He is commemorated by Us as the servant who attained unto the Days of God and was numbered among the well-doers in the Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا عبد الذی فاز بایام الله و کان من المحسنین فی الالواح مکتوبا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
